description: for the training and merge datasets
group_by_col: the group_by_col is column name in the reference dataset
use for merge the parameters dataset with the reference datasets
kind_of_merged: the kind of merged dataset (as_it or sample_params)
sample_params is not relveant in this project
parameters_comment.split_dataset_to_train_and_test: split the dataset to train and test
parameters_comment.test_size: the size of the test dataset

_categories_comment: categories configuration used to group the images by their illumination conditions
the keys are the names of the categories
the values are the list of the illumination conditions
dataset_creation_parameters_comment: there are several parameters that can be used to create the datasets

_mask_computation_comment: mask computation configuration used to create the mask of the object in rgb images
The first methods are computed on execuation time
but regarding to pickle_masks, it is a precomputed and saved as a pickle file
so if you chosse this method, you need to provide the path to the pickle file

_object_filter_method_comment: object filter method configuration used to filter the objects in the hyperspectral images
by_ndvi: filter the objects by their ndvi value
by_hsv: filter the objects by their hsv values
_save_ndi_table_as_comment: csv: save the ndi table as a csv file
hdf5: save the ndi table as a hdf5 file
